MERGE (m_malware_purplefox:Malware {name:'PurpleFox'})
ON CREATE SET
  m_malware_purplefox.family = 'PurpleFox',
  m_malware_purplefox.summary = 'PurpleFox (aka DirtyMoe) is a modular Windows botnet malware first spotted in 2018. It includes a rootkit module for hiding and persistence across reboots, can act as a downloader for second-stage payloads, provides backdoor access, and can function as a DDoS bot. Newer versions were observed using WebSocket C2 for stealth (Oct 2021). A Jan 2022 campaign spread it disguised as a Telegram desktop app. CERT-UA tracked Ukrainian infections as UAC-0027; infections often occur via laced MSI installers and it can self-propagate using exploits for known flaws and password brute-forcing.'
ON MATCH SET
  m_malware_purplefox.family = CASE WHEN m_malware_purplefox.family IS NULL OR trim(m_malware_purplefox.family) = '' THEN 'PurpleFox' ELSE m_malware_purplefox.family END,
  m_malware_purplefox.summary = CASE WHEN m_malware_purplefox.summary IS NULL OR trim(m_malware_purplefox.summary) = '' THEN 'PurpleFox (aka DirtyMoe) is a modular Windows botnet malware first spotted in 2018. It includes a rootkit module for hiding and persistence across reboots, can act as a downloader for second-stage payloads, provides backdoor access, and can function as a DDoS bot. Newer versions were observed using WebSocket C2 for stealth (Oct 2021). A Jan 2022 campaign spread it disguised as a Telegram desktop app. CERT-UA tracked Ukrainian infections as UAC-0027; infections often occur via laced MSI installers and it can self-propagate using exploits for known flaws and password brute-forcing.' ELSE m_malware_purplefox.summary END
WITH m_malware_purplefox

MERGE (ta_uac0027:ThreatActor {name:'UAC-0027'})
ON CREATE SET
  ta_uac0027.summary = 'CERT-UA tracking identifier for activity associated with PurpleFox infections on Ukrainian computers.'
ON MATCH SET
  ta_uac0027.summary = CASE WHEN ta_uac0027.summary IS NULL OR trim(ta_uac0027.summary) = '' THEN 'CERT-UA tracking identifier for activity associated with PurpleFox infections on Ukrainian computers.' ELSE ta_uac0027.summary END
WITH m_malware_purplefox, ta_uac0027

MERGE (ta_dirtymoe:ThreatActor {name:'DirtyMoe'})
ON CREATE SET
  ta_dirtymoe.summary = 'Alias name used for the PurpleFox botnet/malware.'
ON MATCH SET
  ta_dirtymoe.summary = CASE WHEN ta_dirtymoe.summary IS NULL OR trim(ta_dirtymoe.summary) = '' THEN 'Alias name used for the PurpleFox botnet/malware.' ELSE ta_dirtymoe.summary END
WITH m_malware_purplefox, ta_uac0027, ta_dirtymoe

MERGE (m_malware_purplefox)-[r_alias_pf_dm:has_alias]->(ta_dirtymoe)
ON CREATE SET
  r_alias_pf_dm.date = date('2018-01-01')
WITH m_malware_purplefox, ta_uac0027

MERGE (c2_websocket:C2_Infrastructure {service:'WebSocket'})
ON CREATE SET
  c2_websocket.summary = 'WebSocket protocol used for command-and-control communications for stealth.'
ON MATCH SET
  c2_websocket.summary = CASE WHEN c2_websocket.summary IS NULL OR trim(c2_websocket.summary) = '' THEN 'WebSocket protocol used for command-and-control communications for stealth.' ELSE c2_websocket.summary END
WITH m_malware_purplefox, ta_uac0027, c2_websocket

ON CREATE SET
  r_abuse_pf_ws.date = date('2021-10-01'),

ON MATCH SET
  r_abuse_pf_ws.date = CASE WHEN r_abuse_pf_ws.date IS NULL THEN date('2021-10-01') ELSE r_abuse_pf_ws.date END,

WITH m_malware_purplefox, ta_uac0027
